title: Decadent Umami Portuguese Semolina Grill
description: A rich and savory Portuguese dish featuring semolina rimacinata, grilled to perfection with a boost of umami flavor, Whole30 friendly and aerated for a light texture. This recipe combines the best of Portuguese cuisine with a modern twist.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together semolina rimacinata, olive oil, garlic, sea salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add sliced mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the semolina mixture.
Grill the semolina mixture for 4-5 minutes per side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Transfer the grilled semolina to a plate and drizzle with lemon juice.
Let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
Slice into wedges and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
